name: Money20/20 USA
location: The Venetian Expo / Venetian Convention and Expo Center, Las Vegas, Nevada, USA
attendance: 11,000+ attendees from 85 countries; 630+ speakers across 300+ sessions; 380+ sponsors. Theme: "Create the Future".
defi_themes: Stablecoins as mainstream payment rails (cross-border, programmable money) - dominant theme
TradFi x digital-asset convergence ('frenemies' to partners; shared infrastructure over competition)
Tokenization of assets and tokenized infrastructure as the next growth backbone for finance
On-chain / cross-border FX and real-time settlement using stablecoins
Institutional adoption of digital assets (banks integrating stablecoins/digital assets into legacy systems)
Tokenized treasuries / tokenized money-market funds (Circle's tokenized treasury fund context; just-in-time liquidity)
Regulatory tailwinds - GENIUS Act stablecoin legislation cited as driving an uptick in growth
Bank-stablecoin integration ('Speaking Stablecoins to Banks') and embedded digital-asset platforms

notable_panels.title: Frenemies, Friction, and the $27T Opportunity: Inside the Stablecoin Revolution
notable_panels.topic: Stablecoin transaction growth (>$27T/yr), cross-border interoperable rails, merchant acceptance, bank integration; predictions of 10-20% of cross-border commerce moving to stablecoins
notable_panels.speakers: Moderator: Rocio Wu (Partner, F-Prime Capital); Panelists: Eric Barbier (CEO, Triple-A), Yelena Reznikova (Global Head of Partnerships, Bridge), Keith Vander Leest (GM Americas, BVNK)

notable_panels.title: Speaking Stablecoins to Banks
notable_panels.topic: How traditional banks adopt stablecoins; building digital-asset platforms that connect into banks' existing core/digital-banking systems so customers access digital assets like fiat; GENIUS Act driving growth
notable_panels.speakers: Sunil Sachdev (SVP, Embedded Finance & Digital Assets, Fiserv), Caitlin Barnett (Chainalysis), Carol Hartman (Threshold Partners / Brightside Financial)

notable_panels.title: Stablecoins / tokenization & open finance conversations (Intersection Stage)
notable_panels.topic: Stablecoins, tokenization, and open finance as the next chapter of resilient financial infrastructure
notable_panels.speakers: Circle, Citi, and Michael Saylor (MicroStrategy/Strategy) led these conversations

notable_panels.title: Tokenization & cross-border money movement (TradFi x digital assets)
notable_panels.topic: Tokenization enabling just-in-time liquidity and cross-border money movement; orchestration across ecosystems rather than competition
notable_panels.speakers: Naveen Mallela (Global Co-head, Kinexys by J.P. Morgan), Raj Dhamodharan (EVP, Mastercard)

notable_panels.title: How Stablecoins are Powering a New Era of On-chain FX
notable_panels.topic: Use of stablecoins for on-chain foreign exchange and real-time cross-border payments
notable_panels.speakers: Featured speakers from Ripple, Bank of America, and Thunes (cross-border payments programming)

notable_speakers.name: Naveen Mallela
notable_speakers.affiliation: Global Co-head, Kinexys (J.P. Morgan digital assets)

notable_speakers.name: Sunil Sachdev
notable_speakers.affiliation: SVP, Embedded Finance & Digital Assets, Fiserv

key_takeaways: Stablecoins were the breakout DeFi/crypto theme, framed as institutional payment infrastructure ('programmable money' rails) rather than speculative crypto - the industry crossed from pilots to operational execution.

TradFi and digital-native firms increasingly favor partnership and shared infrastructure (tokenization, orchestration) over competition; banks, networks (Mastercard, J.P. Morgan/Kinexys) and crypto-native firms (Circle, Ripple) shared stages.
Regulatory clarity from the GENIUS Act was repeatedly credited with accelerating stablecoin adoption and growth rates among banks and fintechs.
Stablecoin transaction volume cited at >$27 trillion/year; cross-border payments and FX seen as the killer use case, with bank back-end integration being the main friction to solve.

Major announcement: Western Union to launch its U.S. Dollar Payment Token (USDPT) stablecoin in H1 2026 on Solana, partnering with Anchorage Digital Bank - signaling TradFi legitimization of stablecoins.

Tokenization of real-world/financial assets (treasuries, FX, liquidity) positioned as the next growth backbone for mainstream finance; Fiserv recognized (Diamond Award) for democratizing stablecoin access.
